sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24638" key="diagnwri/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διαγνωρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n24638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make known,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τί τινι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg003.perseus-grc1:2:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ev.Luc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.15</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (v.l.); <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">speak publicly,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">περί τινος</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg003.perseus-grc1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
